div.h1: pivot_root() Error Cases: EINVAL and EBUSY

ol.li: new_root must be a mount point — Use mount --bind new_root new_root first
new_root must differ from current root — Cannot pivot to /
put_old must be under new_root — Path must be new_root/oldroot
put_old must exist as directory — Create with mkdir()
Caller needs CAP_SYS_ADMIN — In the user namespace owning mount namespace

text.tspan: // 1. Make new_root a mount point (fixes EINVAL)

g.text: mount(new_root, new_root, NULL, MS_BIND | MS_REC, NULL);

text.tspan: // 5. Unmount old root (fixes EBUSY on future ops)
// 1. Make new_root a mount point (fixes EINVAL)
// 5. Unmount old root (fixes EBUSY on future ops)
# Cause: process has cwd or open file in old root

g.text: COMMAND PID USER FD TYPE DEVICE SIZE/OFF NODE NAME

text.tspan: # Fix: change directory or lazy unmount
# Cause: process has cwd or open file in old root
# Fix: change directory or lazy unmount
